title: Slovakian Herbal Rice Stone-Bowl-Dolsot
description: A crisp and flavorful Slovakian dish featuring herbal rice, wine, and a stone bowl. Kid-friendly and kosher-friendly, this recipe is great for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the butter in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the thyme and rosemary to the saucepan and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken broth and white wine to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
Add the basmati rice to the saucepan and stir to coat with the liquid.
Transfer the saucepan to a stone bowl or a ceramic dish with a heat-proof handle.
Cover the bowl with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 5-10 minutes, or until the rice is tender and crispy on the bottom.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
